traffic.operation_limit_note: 활용사례 등록시 신청하면 트래픽 증가 가능

application.purpose: UMMAYA public-data R&D. Build a citizen transit check adapter for Daejeon subway segment time, distance, and fare using official data. Cite the agency source. No resale.

candidate_adapter.fit_reason: Citizens can ask for official Daejeon subway segment time, distance, and fare before travel. The API returns exactly those fields.
candidate_adapter.caveat: The API requires station numbers, not station names; the adapter must include an official station-name-to-number resolver or fixture.

citizen_queries.query: 대전 지하철 대전역에서 시청역까지 얼마나 걸리고 요금은 얼마야?
citizen_queries.handling: Resolve station names to station numbers, call /getTimeDist01, return time, distance, and fare.
Resolve station names to station numbers, call /getTimeDist01, return distfloat.

citizen_queries.query: 아이랑 대전 지하철 타기 전에 목적지까지 비용과 시간을 확인해줘.
citizen_queries.handling: Use the check primitive to return fare and expected segment duration.
